content: Remote OK Psicopedagogos para alumnos con TDAH TUS Media ГӮВҝEres estudiante de psicopedagogГғВӯa o un profesor/a o profesional del ГғВЎrea?<br><br>En <strong>Tusclasesparticulares</strong>, portal lГғВӯder de clases particulares en EspaГғВұa, buscamos psicopedagogos para clases particulares.<br><br><strong>Tareas<br><br></strong><ul><li>EvaluaciГғВіn inicial para comprender las necesidades del alumno</li><li>Colaborar con el alumno y sus padres para establecer metas<br><br></li></ul><strong>Requisitos<br><br></strong><ul><li>FormaciГғВіn en psicologГғВӯa/pedagogГғВӯa o similar</li><li>No se requiere experiencia como profesor/a particular</li><li>Compromiso con los estudiantes<br><br></li></ul><strong>Beneficios<br><br></strong><ul><li>Modalidades de trabajo: teletrabajo/hГғВӯbrido /presencial</li><li>Horario flexible: tГғВә decides tu disponibilidad.</li><li>Gana entre 20ГўВӮВ¬ y 45ГўВӮВ¬ por hora.</li></ul> Barcelona, Barcelona, CataluГғВұa, EspaГғВұa 2026-07-03T15:08:50+00:00 1134428 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-psicopedagogos-para-alumnos-con-tdah-tus-media-1134428 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Entry Level Administrative Assistant ReLyticx HR <p>Our fast-growing company is seeking a dedicated <strong>Entry-Level Administrative Assistant</strong> to support the smooth operation of our daily business activities. In this role, you will assist with organizing, updating, and maintaining accurate company records and databases while ensuring information is handled efficiently and correctly.</p> <p>You will also provide general administrative support across teams, helping to improve workflow and streamline internal processes. Strong computer skills, a willingness to learn, and a keen eye for detail are essential for success in this position.</p> <p>This remote opportunity offers flexible working arrangements and the chance to grow within a supportive and dynamic work environment.</p> <p>ГӮ </p> <p><strong>What YouГўВҖВҷll Be Doing:</strong></p> <ul><li>Perform data entry and maintain accurate records across internal systems </li><li>Update spreadsheets, trackers, and documentation regularly </li><li>Organize digital files and ensure information is easy to access </li><li>Assist with scheduling, task coordination, and administrative workflows </li><li>Monitor and follow up on assigned tasks to ensure completion </li><li>Support internal teams by maintaining structured and up-to-date information </li><li>Identify and flag missing or inconsistent data for correction </li><li>Maintain clear and professional written communication </li><br></ul> <p>ГӮ </p> <p><strong>What WeГўВҖВҷre Looking For:</strong></p> <ul><li>Strong attention to detail and accuracy </li><li>Good organizational and time management skills </li><li>Ability to follow instructions and structured workflows </li><li>Basic familiarity with tools like Google Sheets or Microsoft Excel </li><li>Clear written communication skills </li><li>Ability to manage repetitive tasks with consistency </li><li>Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote environment </li><li>No prior experience required ГўВҖВ” training will be provided </li><br></ul> <p>ГӮ </p> <p><strong>Tools &amp; Work Environment:</strong></p> <ul><li>Spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel) </li><li>Internal tracking and documentation systems </li><li>Email and communication platforms </li><li>Remote collaboration tools (chat and video calls) </li><br></ul> <p>ГӮ </p> <p><strong>Benefits:</strong></p> <ul><li>Competitive entry-level compensation </li><li>Flexible remote working schedule </li><li>Structured onboarding and training support </li><li>Opportunities for career growth in administration and operations </li><li>Performance-based incentives </li><li>Supportive and collaborative remote team environment </li><li>Access to learning resources and skill development tools </li><br></ul> <p>ГӮ </p> <p><strong>Why Join?</strong></p> <p>This role offers a strong foundation in administrative support and digital operations. You will gain practical experience in data management, task coordination, and workflow organizationГўВҖВ”skills that are highly transferable across various career paths.</p> <p>ГӮ </p> <p><strong>Keywords:<br></strong><br>Administrative assistant ГўВҖВў Entry-level ГўВҖВў Remote role ГўВҖВў Data entry ГўВҖВў Office support ГўВҖВў Task coordination ГўВҖВў Digital organization ГўВҖВў Spreadsheet skills ГўВҖВў Work from home ГўВҖВў Career development</p> <p>ГӮ </p> <p>ГӮ </p> hr, virtual assistant, education Alberta, Alberta, Canada 2026-07-03T14:44:20+00:00 1134433 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-entry-level-administrative-assistant-relyticx-hr-1134433 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Junior Data Analyst Numa <p><strong>ABOUT NUMA</strong></p><p><br></p><p>Hey there! WeГўВҖВҷre Numa, a forward-thinking hospitality brand redefining how people discover cities. We create spaces where simplicity meets innovation, offering thoughtfully designed rooms, studios, and apartments in the heart of EuropeГўВҖВҷs most vibrant neighbourhoods.</p><p><br></p><p>WeГўВҖВҷre not just transforming the guest experienceГўВҖВ”weГўВҖВҷre revolutionizing the hospitality industry from the inside out. Our cutting-edge technology streamlines operations, delivering unparalleled value with no hidden feesГўВҖВ”just real, quality experiences.</p><p><br></p><p>At Numa, we believe that travel should be curious and authentic, and we bring those same values to our work culture. As part of our team, youГўВҖВҷll experience a dynamic and supportive environment where creativity thrives, and your contributions make a real impact. WeГўВҖВҷre committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace where every voice is valued, and different perspectives fuel our innovation.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>ABOUT THE ROLE</strong></p><p>ГўВ—ВҸ Extract and analyse data from multiple large-scale data warehouses, supporting the setup, maintenance, and integration of data sources.</p><p>ГўВ—ВҸ Develop dashboards and reporting to generate commercial insights across revenue functions, including Revenue Management, Marketing, Strategy, and other business teams.</p><p>ГўВ—ВҸ Proactively identify trends, patterns, and anomalies in data, and translate findings into actionable recommendations and process improvements.</p><p>ГўВ—ВҸ Collaborate with stakeholders to identify strategic opportunities and answer key business questions through data analysis.</p><p>ГўВ—ВҸ Present analyses and insights to a wide range of business stakeholders in a clear and compelling way.</p><p>ГўВ—ВҸ Enable stakeholders to independently leverage data by developing self-service dashboards and tools (e.g., Looker).</p><p>ГўВ—ВҸ Support the development, standardization, and rollout of internal reporting across the organization.</p><p>ГўВ—ВҸ Contribute to improving data quali
